title: Timeline Entry AI Output
description: Structured JSON output from the AI timeline entry formatting step. Produces a display-ready entry for the intraday alert timeline from an already-classified alert. Validated before writing to D1 and rendering in the frontend.

headline.description: Display-ready headline for the timeline entry. Shorter and punchier than the classification headline. Factual. No HTML. No sensationalism.

summary_text.description: One to two sentence summary written for timeline scanning. Plain language. Factual, third-person. No HTML.

severity_level.description: Normalized display severity derived from the classification severity_score. high = score >= 75, medium = score >= 40, low = score < 40. Included in the structured AI output for validation, storage, and downstream consumers.

label.description: Short categorical label displayed as a badge on the timeline entry (e.g. 'Price Action', 'Regulatory', 'Macro', 'Earnings', 'On-Chain'). Topic-appropriate and human-readable.

label_color.description: Optional semantic color hint for the label badge. Null lets the frontend apply its default. Use 'red' for regulatory/risk events, 'green' for positive market events, 'gray' for neutral/routine.

examples.headline: Bitcoin Breaks $120K All-Time High
examples.summary_text: Bitcoin surged past $120,000 for the first time, driven by record institutional ETF inflows exceeding $1.5 billion in a single session.
examples.label: Price Action

examples.headline: SEC Issues Warning on Unregistered Crypto Exchanges
examples.summary_text: The SEC released a formal warning targeting unregistered cryptocurrency exchanges operating in the US, signalling increased enforcement pressure.
examples.label: Regulatory

examples.headline: US 10-Year Treasury Yield Edges Up to 4.32%
examples.summary_text: The 10-year US Treasury yield rose 2 basis points to 4.32% ahead of tomorrow's CPI print, with no significant market reaction.
examples.label: Macro
